ops.title: Per-kind history commands are deliberately absent from the MCP tool set
ops.body: The MCP surface carries `note/doc/log/task/sprint/project/runbook history` through the single kind-agnostic `history` tool (id-prefix resolution reaches every kind), so the seven per-kind wrappers are in `excludedCommandPaths` in `internal/mcpserver/reverse_test.go` rather than getting seven redundant MCP twins. Redundant tools cost every agent tool-search noise; the exclusion is the decision, not an oversight. If a per-kind history tool ever becomes necessary (e.g. kind-specific filters), remove the exclusion entry in the same change — TestCobraReachableFromMCP will then force the tool into existence.
